old_value: {"id":"agent-swarm-2y2.1","title":"Core Foundation: matrix ops, network, MNIST loader, metrics, config","description":"Build src/core/ — matrix.py (from-scratch matrix multiply, transpose, element-wise, broadcasting — NO numpy), network.py (base NN class with forward/backprop, Strategy interface), mnist.py (MNIST IDX loader — may use numpy/struct for parsing only, returns plain Python lists), metrics.py (accuracy, backward transfer, forgetting measure), config.py (all hyperparameters).
